text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh, rumble!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oho! A golden opportunity! Is this a dream?! Am I
dreaming?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! This our chance to race Suzuka again
before the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Fan Fest—a time when Tracen
Academy welcomes fans onto campus with a
variety of events.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The highlight is the sports competition, where the
students participate in events they don't normally
do, like ball games and martial arts.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
She's still got the edge on me in running, but
maybe I can take her in a different event...

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Silence Suzuka claims a sweeping victory
in racewalking too! She just marched on silent and
steady!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I was completely focused on walking... Did I do
well?

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka dominates the volleyball match
with a superhuman—no, super-Umamusume jump!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
All I did was run and jump. My teammate fed me
the ball perfectly...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No way! She's even untouchable outside of racing!
She's a natural athlete!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I've got it! I can take her in a three-legged race!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka dominates the three-legged race
as well! Silence Suzuka and Special Week—a
match made in heaven!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: We did it, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! Et tu, Spe?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter! Some way, somehow, I gotta
beat Suzuka and get myself back on track!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I don't care what it takes, Trainer! I'll do anything!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Let's settle this fair and square, Suzuka! In the
ring! Let's wrestle!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whaaat? But that's your specialty, El!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Is there even a wrestling event? I think there's
sumo wrestling, but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sumo is fine!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: All right, let's go, Suzuka! Let's get our sumo on!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, w-wait a minute...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa drags Silence Suzuka to the ring,
and the sumo match begins.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hu—what?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't take long before El Condor Pasa is
knocked out of the ring.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
W-wow... I was railroaded! She blasted forward
like a runaway train with immense strength!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: This is Silence Suzuka! The OP train!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: You can do it, El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: You're the only one who has a chance!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! This cheering... this hope! Can I really let
their calls go unanswered?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No! Of course not! Suzuka, one more round! Let's
do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Zoom!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Aggghhh!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But it's not over yet!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa stands back up heroically each
time her fans cheer her on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And each time she stands up, her own spirits rise
as well.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You're still standing?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Everyone's cheerin' for me to win! This is the last—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Zoom!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Aaaughhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, El Condor Pasa doesn't win even a
single bout.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Now for our interview with this year's MVP,
Silence Suzuka. Any comments?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm completely exhausted...

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Next up, this year's recipient of the Tenacity
Prize, El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I-I... I'm so devastated!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Heeey, Suzuka! Team El is gonna grind your army
into dust one day! You hear me?! DUST!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Overwhelmed with frustration, El Condor Pasa
ends up sounding like a heel wrestler.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your support, everyone! You won't
regret it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Just you wait! One day, I will have... my
reveeenge!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Heartwarming applause and laughter breaks out
in the audience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she lost, El Condor Pasa's incredible
determination has won the hearts of fans.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Uhh... judges? Could you make El the MVP?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Personally, I think she's the biggest reason the
Fan Fest was so exciting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Quite a generous comment, considering how
much the Fan Fest served to reaffirm Silence
Suzuka's fearsome strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: My toe is... outside the ring...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Did I... do it?! I did it! I finally won!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa wrings out every last drop of her
strength to pull off a win, and the audience goes
wild!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Now for our interview with this year's MVP,
Silence Suzuka. Any comments?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm not the real MVP.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You should be interviewing El. She's the one that
got the crowd going.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: Well then, El Condor Pasa. Any comments?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, thank you, everyone! Thank you so much!
I'm so grateful!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's thanks to your support that I could beat
Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa is enveloped in the wild cheering.
Without a doubt, her fans will be watching her
next race.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: See you at the Takarazuka Kinen, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've been looking forward to a rematch ever since
the Mainichi Okan.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You're the greatest obstacle before me on my
journey to success—the dragon at the gates! But
I'm stronger than ever, so get ready for a fight!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All right, but you won't win this time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What has been won, and what has yet to be
achieved. It seems El Condor Pasa has made her
determination clear to Silence Suzuka.
